steps: Go to https://console.particle.io/ and log in (create an account at https://login.particle.io/signup if needed)
Navigate to your product or account Authentication view
Click '+ New Client' in the top right corner
Select the OAuth client type: 'Installed App' for CLI/desktop, or 'Web App' for server-side
Enter your application name and redirect URI
Copy the generated Client ID and Client Secret
Use these credentials to obtain access tokens via the Particle OAuth flow
notes: Particle also supports personal access tokens for simpler integrations — generate them at https://docs.particle.io/reference/cloud-apis/access-tokens/
Free tier available for up to 100 devices; enterprise plans available for larger fleets
The console.particle.io manages devices, fleets, SIM cards, and OAuth clients
